title: Rancher's pen (optimisation)
text:
A rancher wants to build a rectangular pen, using one side of her barn for one side of the pen, and using 100m of fencing for the other three sides.

What are the dimensions of the pen built this way that has the largest area?

goal.phrase: the dimensions of the pen built this way that has the largest area
goal.whenWorded: the area is as large as possible

variables.content: Let $x$ = length of the side parallel to the barn (m).
Let $y$ = length of each of the two sides perpendicular to the barn (m).

equations.phrase: 100m of fencing for the other three sides

solution: Maximum area $A = 50 \times 25 = 1250\text{ m}^2$, when the pen is $50$m by $25$m.
